target.title: [security] fix(providers): validate sibling endpoint overrides
target.body:
## Summary
- Add a shared provider endpoint override validator for sibling usage providers.
- Restrict MiniMax and Alibaba endpoint overrides to their expected provider domains by default.
- Reject non-HTTPS schemes, embedded userinfo, and percent-encoded host delimiters before credentials are attached to follow-up requests.
- Fail closed when an explicit endpoint override is rejected, instead of silently falling back to the default credentialed provider endpoint.
- Preserve explicit custom-proxy/test-host compatibility through opt-in unsafe HTTPS-only override switches.
- Add focused regression coverage for rejected attacker hosts, encoded-delimiter bypasses, rejected `http://` overrides, rejected `user:pass@` URLs, accepted provider-owned HTTPS/bare host overrides, opt-in custom HTTPS hosts, opt-in rejection of `http://`/userinfo, and fail-closed fetcher behavior.
- Update MiniMax and Alibaba provider docs to make the provider-owned HTTPS-only default and unsafe custom-host opt-in explicit.

## Compatibility note
This intentionally treats explicit `http://...` endpoint overrides as invalid, even for otherwise provider-owned hosts. These settings carry cookies or API credentials into provider requests, so preserving insecure HTTP compatibility would keep a credential-disclosure footgun. Bare host overrides such as `platform.minimaxi.com` and provider HTTPS URLs remain supported.

Arbitrary proxy/test domains are rejected by default for these credentialed provider paths. If a caller intentionally routes MiniMax or Alibaba Coding Plan traffic through a custom HTTPS proxy/test host, they can opt in explicitly with:

- `MINIMAX_ALLOW_UNTRUSTED_ENDPOINT_OVERRIDES=true`
- `ALIBABA_CODING_PLAN_ALLOW_UNTRUSTED_ENDPOINT_OVERRIDES=true`

The opt-in only relaxes the provider-owned-host allowlist. It still rejects `http://`, embedded userinfo, and encoded host-delimiter tricks so credentials are not sent over insecure or authority-confusing URLs.

## Validation
- `swift run EndpointProof` from a temporary local package depending on this checkout's `CodexBarCore` — passed. The proof exercised the real CodexBar settings/env reader and fetcher paths with redacted credentials/cookies:

```text
PASS MiniMax accepted provider HTTPS overrides: hosts=platform.minimaxi.com,platform.minimax.io
PASS Alibaba accepted provider HTTPS override: host=pre-cn-hangzhou.alibabacloud.com
PASS MiniMax rejected attacker override before network: MINIMAX_CODING_PLAN_URL
PASS MiniMax rejected http override before network: MINIMAX_CODING_PLAN_URL
PASS MiniMax rejected userinfo override before network: MINIMAX_CODING_PLAN_URL
PASS MiniMax rejected encoded-host override before network: MINIMAX_CODING_PLAN_URL
PASS Alibaba API rejected attacker override before network: ALIBABA_CODING_PLAN_QUOTA_URL
PASS Alibaba API rejected http override before network: ALIBABA_CODING_PLAN_QUOTA_URL
PASS Alibaba API rejected userinfo override before network: ALIBABA_CODING_PLAN_QUOTA_URL
PASS Alibaba API rejected encoded-host override before network: ALIBABA_CODING_PLAN_QUOTA_URL
Endpoint override real env/settings-path proof passed
```

- `swift run DiagnosticSmoke` from a temporary local package depending on this checkout's `CodexBarCore` — passed. The proof exercises `ProviderDiagnosticError.errorCategory(_:)` for `AlibabaCodingPlanUsageError.invalidEndpointOverride("ALIBABA_CODING_PLAN_QUOTA_URL")` and verifies the invalid endpoint override remains a configuration issue instead of being text-classified as API/network:

```text
category=configuration
safeDescription=Configuration issue - check provider source and settings
PASS Alibaba invalid endpoint override diagnostic is configuration
```

- `swiftc -parse Sources/CodexBarCore/ProviderEndpointOverrideValidator.swift Sources/CodexBarCore/Providers/MiniMax/MiniMaxSettingsReader.swift Sources/CodexBarCore/Providers/Alibaba/AlibabaCodingPlanSettingsReader.swift Sources/CodexBarCore/Providers/MiniMax/MiniMaxUsageFetcher.swift Sources/CodexBarCore/Providers/Alibaba/AlibabaCodingPlanUsageFetcher.swift Tests/CodexBarTests/MiniMaxProviderTests.swift Tests/CodexBarTests/AlibabaCodingPlanProviderTests.swift` — passed.
- Temporary standalone smoke executable using the real validator/settings-reader files — passed:

```text
endpoint override opt-in smoke: PASS
```

- `swift build --target CodexBarCore` — previously passed on this PR branch.
- `git diff --check` — passed.
- `make check` — SwiftFormat lint mode previously passed (`0/998 files require formatting`); SwiftLint was blocked by the existing local SourceKit issue (`Loading sourcekitdInProc.framework/Versions/A/sourcekitdInProc failed`).
- `swift test --filter 'MiniMaxProviderTests|AlibabaCodingPlanProviderTests'` — still blocked before the focused tests by the existing local `KeyboardShortcuts`/SwiftUI `#Preview` macro toolchain issue (`PreviewsMacros` plugin not found) with active developer directory set to CommandLineTools rather than full Xcode.
target.author: hinotoi-agent
